name: Seasoned Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut out stems of tomatoes.
2. Halve the tomatoes.
3. Arrange the tomato halves in a square pan that has been buttered.
4. Sprinkle seasoned salt and garlic powder over the tomatoes.
5. In a small bowl, combine bread crumbs and melted butter; blend together.
6. Sprinkle the crumb mixture evenly over the tops of the tomatoes.
7. Sprinkle parsley flakes over the tomato mixture.
8. Sprinkle sesame seeds over the tomatoes.
9. Bake in an oven preheated to 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the tomatoes are fork-tender.
